_publications._publicationTitle: Suppression of proliferation of two independent NF1 malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cell lines by the pan-ErbB inhibitor CI-1033.

_contextSnippet: Both NF1 lines expressed substantially higher levels of EGFR and ErbB2 receptor than the STS-26T line
details: Expressed substantially higher levels of EGFR and ErbB2 receptor than the STS-26T line
